description: Kurviger is a motorcycle route planning and navigation service focused on curvy, rider-friendly routes. Its website and documentation describe using Kurviger routing through GraphHopper rather than through a public API hosted on kurviger.de.
summary: Kurviger.de itself does not expose a developer-callable API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on kurviger.de subdomains; its docs state that the Kurviger routing API is provided as a package via GraphHopper instead.
